mapper.update: UPDATE reply_vendor SET gno=#{reply_vendor_id} WHERE reply_vendor_id = #{reply_vendor_id}

sql.where:
reply_status = 0
AND (title LIKE '%${searchWord}%' OR body LIKE '%${searchWord}%')
AND ${searchType} LIKE '%${searchWord}%'

mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, u.name AS writer_name, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply_vendor a WHERE a.gno = r.reply_vendor_id AND a.reply_status = 1 ) AS answer_count FROM reply_vendor r LEFT JOIN user u ON u.user_id = r.user_id
ORDER BY r.reply_vendor_id DESC LIMIT #{startIdx}, 5

SELECT r.reply_vendor_id AS reply_vendor_id, r.admin_id AS admin_id, r.title AS title, r.body AS body, r.reply_status AS reply_status, r.created_at AS created_at, r.gno AS gno, r.user_id AS user_id, r.writer AS writer, u.name AS writer_name FROM reply_vendor r LEFT JOIN user u ON r.user_id = u.user_id WHERE r.gno = #{reply_vendor_id} AND r.reply_status = 1 LIMIT 1
